title: what kind of instrumentality gendo want
display_title: what kind of instrumentality gendo want
wikitext:
[]: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by letsgo2323 » Wed Jul 31, 2024 5:42 pm so i dont understand what is the instrumentality that seele and gendo want? and their ways to occur third impact. can someone explain??

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 01, 2024 11:11 am SEELE wants to combine all souls into a single godlike entity, Gendo wants to be reunited with his wife. That's about it.

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by Tim Julius » Mon Aug 26, 2024 7:31 am I think SEELE and Gendo both want the Third Impact to merge all human souls into one being, but they have different plans for how it should happen. SEELE aims for a collective consciousness, while Gendo seeks to reunite with his lost wife.

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Aug 26, 2024 9:52 am There's a big clue. Seele accuses Gendo of wanting to use Eva as "an Ark", and says that's not their plan. Well, an Ark is something in which you ride out a storm and then emerge. In other words, Seele wanted a permanent collective entity; Gendo only wanted it to last for the duration of Third Impact, while he reunited with Yui. Then everyone would emerge and reembody. The final result was closer to Gendo's plan than Seele's because Shinji rejected Instrumentality. If he had accepted it it would have been close to Seele's plan.

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Mon Aug 26, 2024 11:43 am I think Gendo also wants to create the new world with Yui. Not just unite with her. Remember he was already part of SEELE before Yui was gone.

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by eva'n_mark » Tue Aug 27, 2024 9:02 pm ALL FOR YUIIIIII!!!!!!!!! ^^D NOUTHING BUT YUIIIIIIIIIIII

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by Sertraline » Sat Sep 14, 2024 9:56 am The kind that brings his wife back, lol.

[]: Re: what kind of instrumentality gendo want?             Quote Post by Godai » Sun Nov 17, 2024 8:43 am From what I understand , Gendo's ultimate goal is to reunite with his wife who died during the early stages of the Evangelion project. However, his vision of reunion is far from conventional. He seeks to transcend human form and existence through the Third Impact, believing it will allow him to achieve a god-like state where he can be with her again. While SEELE also seeks the Third Impact as part of their Human Instrumentality Project—to merge humanity into a collective consciousness and eliminate individual suffering. Gendo manipulates their plans to serve his own purposes. He does not fully share SEELE's vision of humanity's unification. Instead, he intends to reshape the event to achieve his personal goal of transcendence, elevating himself and Yui beyond human limitations. In this way, Gendo uses the Third Impact to fulfill his own desires while deceiving SEELE into believing they are both working toward the same end.
